issues.title: Crystal zone → OghamPanel not wired
issues.detail: onZoneClick('crystal') falls through to showZoneToast() only. OghamPanel IS initialized (initOghamPanel() main.ts:413) before runBiome() runs. Wiring gap, not architectural blocker.
issues.recommendation: Dispatch CustomEvent('merlin_show_ogham_panel') from crystal zone callback in MerlinLairScene.ts. Add window.addEventListener('merlin_show_ogham_panel', () => showOghamPanel()) in main.ts before lair opens.

issues.title: Bookshelf + Cauldron zones are interaction stubs
issues.detail: Both produce toast only. Bookshelf should open journal/RunSummary. Three of five meaningful zones are NOPs.

issues.title: birdTimer field misnamed (C82-05 still open)
issues.detail: AmbientSession.birdTimer assigned rain drop timers in scheduleRainDrops(). Rename to stochasticTimer.
issues.recommendation: One-liner rename across interface and 3 usages.
